headline: Lightskin Legends ✊🏽: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Lightskin Legends ✊🏽 is projected #5 of 16 with a 81.18 championship-lineup C-AVI average, led by Jonathan Taylor, Chase Brown, and Javonte Williams. The immediate priority is improving the WR slot without weakening that core.

projected_power.method: Verified championship-lineup C-AVI average from all 16 AVI-Core knowledge team files

latest_trade.summary: On October 28, Lightskin Legends ✊🏽 traded with Murray had a little Lamb and acquired Kayshon Boutte while sending 2026 Round 3 (original roster 1), 2027 Round 2 (original roster 1). The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility.

gap_closing_moves: Raise the WR slot above Parker Washington's 64.8 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 77.8 C-AVI would directly attack the 1.62-point projected gap to SmokyValleyWheatWarriors.
Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

latest_trade.summary: On July 8, Corgi Loaf Baking Co. traded with Rapid Valley Annihilation and acquired 2026 Round 1 (original roster 2) while sending 2027 Round 1 (original roster 11), 2028 Round 1 (original roster 11). The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 1 draft asset.

sections.title: Projected Power Position
sections.body: Projected #5 of 16 at 81.18 lineup C-AVI. SmokyValleyWheatWarriors is immediately above at 82.80, a gap of 1.62. Corgi Loaf Baking Co. is immediately behind at 80.86.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Jonathan Taylor (97.6), Chase Brown (96.3), and Javonte Williams (81.0).

sections.body: Raise the WR slot above Parker Washington's 64.8 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 77.8 C-AVI would directly attack the 1.62-point projected gap to SmokyValleyWheatWarriors.
